key.name: active
key.summary: Whether the warm tint is currently shown

key.name: tint-color
key.summary: Warm target color as a #rrggbb hex string (what white becomes at full strength)

key.name: brightness
key.summary: Screen brightness multiplier (1 = native, lower = dimmer)

key.name: all-monitors
key.summary: Tint every monitor; if false, leave the primary monitor untouched

key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.summary: Keyboard shortcut to toggle the tint
